theme: Long power-free word hitting target letter mix
title: Long Square-Free Word Hitting a Target Letter Mix
strategies: trivial: reproduce the checker's own target-blind separator scaffold (flat 0.25/0.25/0.25/0.25 mix)
greedy: per-letter frequency-deficit order with square-free feasibility and single-step backtracking (tracks only running letter counts, blind to the target transition preference)
strong: steer the same square-free construction by a weighted combination of frequency deficit AND the target letter-transition preference, matching the checker's own 0.25/0.75 weighting
invalid: emit a word that opens with an immediate square ("00") to fail the feasibility gate
